purpose: Rehearse registry/routing/gate-policy update application after proposal review, without writing files or production resources.
hard_rules: Apply rehearsal must not write registry files.
Apply rehearsal must not mutate website source, D1, R2, KV, Workers, Cloudflare, git, or deployment state.
Apply rehearsal only proves that a reviewed proposal can be transformed into an apply plan.
Real apply requires separate explicit apply gate and rollback rehearsal.
Unknown future proposal shapes must safe-stop into review or triage.
